raw_cv_text:
Nil Nelson
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: nil.nelson@outlook.com | LinkedIn: nil-nelson | GitHub: NilNelson | https://nilnelson.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | Bachelor of Arts in Computer Science 2015 - 2018
Achieved First-Class Honours with distinction in systems programming and distributed computing
Led university coding competition team to regional finals, mentoring 12 junior developers
ETH Zurich | Master of Science in Computer Science 2018 - 2020
Specialized in Human-Computer Interaction and Frontend Architecture with 4.0 GPA
Published research paper on accessibility patterns in modern web applications with 200+ citations
EXPERIENCE
Figma | Senior Frontend Engineer 2022 - Present
Architected and deployed new collaborative canvas rendering engine, improving performance by 45% and reducing
latency from 250ms to 120ms for 2M+ daily active users
Led frontend refactoring initiative across 8 feature teams, reducing bundle size by 32% (1.2MB saved) and improving
Lighthouse scores from 78 to 94
Mentored 4 junior engineers on React best practices and performance optimization, contributing to 100% promotion rate
within 18 months
Stripe | Staff Frontend Engineer 2020 - 2022
Redesigned payment forms component library, increasing form completion rates by 28% and generating $2.1M in
additional annual payment volume
Implemented real-time validation system using WebSockets and RxJS, reducing transaction processing errors by 67%
across 50K+ merchant partners
Established comprehensive frontend testing standards achieving 89% code coverage and reducing production bugs by
41%
Cloudflare | Senior Frontend Engineer 2018 - 2020
Built real-time analytics dashboard processing 100B+ requests daily using Vue.js and Canvas APIs, adopted by 95% of
enterprise customers
Optimized critical rendering path reducing initial page load time by 56% (3.2s to 1.4s) through code splitting and service
worker caching strategies
Spearheaded accessibility initiative, achieving WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across 40 products and increasing accessible
user base by 18%
Notion | Frontend Engineer 2016 - 2018
Developed real-time collaborative editing components in TypeScript, supporting 500K concurrent users with zero data
loss
Reduced app initialization time by 62% through lazy loading and progressive enhancement, improving mobile conversion
by 23%
Implemented comprehensive design system with 150+ reusable components, reducing development time across teams by
40%
PROJECTS
FlowSync | React, TypeScript, WebRTC, Redis, Node.js 2023 - Present
Built real-time collaborative whiteboarding SaaS with WebRTC peer connections supporting 1000+ simultaneous
collaborators with 99.7% uptime
Implemented differential synchronization algorithm reducing bandwidth usage by 74% while maintaining sub-100ms
latency across 50 countries
PixelPerfect | Vue.js, Canvas API, WebGL, Electron 2021 - 2022
Created cross-platform image editing desktop app acquiring 50K+ downloads with 4.8-star rating and 95% retention rate
Optimized WebGL rendering pipeline achieving 60fps performance on mid-range devices, expanding addressable market
by 320%
a11y-Scout | React, Puppeteer, Axe DevTools, Node.js, GraphQL 2022
Developed open-source accessibility auditing tool with 800+ GitHub stars used by 2K+ organizations for automated
WCAG compliance testing
Engineered headless browser testing pipeline detecting 95% of accessibility violations automatically, reducing manual
audit time by 70%
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Advanced Patterns Conference | Speaker & Workshop Facilitator 2022 - Present
Delivered annual talks on frontend performance optimization reaching 1200+ developers with average 4.7/5 satisfaction
rating
Conducted hands-on workshops teaching concurrent rendering and Suspense patterns to 300+ engineers across FAANG
companies
Open Source Mentorship Program | Senior Mentor 2020 - Present
Guided 8 early-career developers in contributing to high-impact open-source projects with cumulative 12K+ GitHub stars
Facilitated code reviews and architecture discussions resulting in 15+ merged pull requests and mentee placement in
senior roles
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, GraphQL, SQL
Technologies – React, Vue.js, Next.js, Electron, WebRTC, Canvas API, WebGL, Redux, RxJS, Node.js, Express
Tools – Webpack, Vite, Jest, Cypress, Figma, Chrome DevTools, Lighthouse, Docker, Git, AWS CloudFront, DataDog APM
name: Nil Nelson
